title: Baristas
description: Prepare or serve specialty coffee or other beverages. Serve food such as baked goods or sandwiches to patrons.

tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare or serve hot or cold beverages, such as coffee, espresso drinks, blended coffees, or teas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Take customer orders and convey them to other employees for preparation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean or sanitize work areas, utensils, or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Describe menu items to customers, or suggest products that might appeal to them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve prepared foods, such as muffins, biscotti, or bagels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare or serve menu items, such as sandwiches or salads.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up or restock product displays.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weigh, grind, or pack coffee beans for customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stock customer service stations with paper products or beverage preparation items.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wrap, label, or date food items for sale.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide customers with product details, such as coffee blend or preparation descriptions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Order, receive, or stock supplies or retail products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Slice fruits, vegetables, desserts, or meats for use in food service.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check temperatures of freezers, refrigerators, or heating equipment to ensure proper functioning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Demonstrate the use of retail equipment, such as espresso machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create signs to advertise store products or events.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
